remarks: Rare 3.75-Acre Builder Opportunity on W Hill Road Exceptional opportunity to own 3.75 private acres in one of the area's most prestigious and sought-after locations-W Hill Road. This unique property features an existing 4,400 sq ft main residence plus a separate 900 sq ft cottage, offering endless possibilities for builders, investors, or end-users seeking a private estate setting. The current home presents a prime rehab opportunity with substantial square footage, solid footprint, and the potential to transform into a luxury showpiece. The detached cottage is ideal for guest quarters, rental income, or on-site living during construction. For developers, the expansive parcel offers subdivision potential to create up to three additional home sites. Surrounded by high-end properties and set in an enclave, this is a rare chance to build new luxury homes in a premier location with strong resale value. land, privacy, and prime positioning make this a standout investment. Endless possibilities - renovate, build new, or develop. Opportunities like this on W Hill Road are few and far between. Tenant-occupied. Please do not walk the property or disturb tenants.
